creator: stewart+FreeBSD-BugZilla@arnos-vale.net
text:
Created attachment 240210
Patch to extra-patch-blacklistd to apply cleanly

Hi,
With the latest update to 9.2p1, the optional/BLACKLISTD-conditional extra-patch-blacklistd patch no longer cleanly applies since the underlying sshd_config.5 file has changed. The attached diff fixes that.
Stewart.
